title: Chapter 19
content:
Chapter 19

"My mouth?" Sandra asked with a strange look on her face before she looked at my still throbbing dick. I was running out of time, so I quickly said, "Yes, your mouth."

She seemed a little conflicted but then opened her mouth to put my dick inside her mouth. Only the head had entered her mouth when I could feel her teeth grazing it, so I said, "Your teeth hurt. How about you open your mouth wide but just close the lips?"

My suggestion sounded like an experiment, but I knew exactly what I was doing, and she did exactly the same thing as if on instinct. I guess womanly instincts were a thing when it came to sex.

Once she was in place and I only had a minute left, I began to move back and forth, giving the excuse, "It's just like rubbing with your hands. Only now I'm using your lips."

There was a look of understanding in her eyes as if what I said made sense. I began to push deeper, but made sure to enter my mana through her body using my hand. I placed it on her cheek as if holding her face in place, but what I did was to inject the smallest amount of mana inside her body and loosen her throat.

It worked like a charm, and she didn't gag even when I began to hit the back of her mouth.

As much as I wanted to enter her throat, I was running out of time, only half a minute left on the clock so I told her, "Try to suck in your breath a little harder."

Sandra just remained there, letting me use her mouth for my pleasure, and did exactly as I asked. She sucked her cheeks in and then let out her breath through her nose, tickling my cock with her hot breath. It wasn't perfect, but the sensation was enough to push me to the edge. The situation was already hot enough so that a small push was enough, and I pushed in one thrust, entering her tight throat after I had made sure to loosen it with my mana as well.

Still, I only made sure she wouldn't gag. The tightness of her throat, on the other hand, remained just the same.'

"Kugh!" I groaned as I erupted inside of her throat, the sensation heavenly as it could have been from a blowjob. It was too tight for me to not feel so good and the way it contracted around my dick on instinct made me feel even more better as my sensitive head was stimulated far beyond anything I could imagine from a blowjob.

But the thing that turned me on the most was...

"Gulp."

"Gulp."

"Gulp."

Her constant gulping sounds.

The reason her throat was contracting was because she was drinking my semen that I was letting out inside of her in a large, very large quantity. Still, I was deep enough and she was drinking with ease that none of it went to waste and ended up deep inside of her stomach.

I must have cummed for almost twenty seconds because by the time I was empty, the timer had also ended but unlike yesterday, thankfully I was fully empty and the sensation had passed.

My dick returned to the abnormal stub and I pulled back, my penis barely covered by her full lips. She didn't break eye contact with me the entire time while I was cumming but now that I was done, she looked at my penis and said, "It's back to normal."

Normal from her point of view.

"Yeah, that's what happened yesterday, too," I replied.

"So it's temporary." She said as if she was in deep thought before she looked at me, "Since it is not permanent, there is no need to tell anyone about it. If it enlarges like before, we can take care of it."

It seemed like she was afraid of someone finding out about this abnormality of mine. Again, abnormal from her point of view.

I nodded and asked, "Then can I ask for your help to return it to normal when needed?"

"Of course. Why wouldn't I help my younger brother?" She said with a smile before she once again fell into deep thought.

When she didn't say anything for a while, I sat back in, looking at her covered in dried semen, which was a turn on, but I was more curious about what she was thinking, "What are you thinking about?"

"Well," She began but it looked like she wasn't sure of her theory, "The stuff that came out of your penis was full of magical energy. It replenished my mana in an instant, so it's probably not a bad thing. We can't be too sure, but I'll have to discuss this with an alchemist since they make potions most of the time. If such a potion exists, then it can be very profitable."

I... didn't think of it like that. I mean sure, this was the first time my dick had become like this and my semen affected by that as well, but still, it was a good business model.

"Also," While I was processing her words, she said, "Not only was it tasty, I could also feel something funny down here."

She parted her legs to show me her slit that was not covered in my spunk unfortunately. It was still underwater, so I couldn't tell if it was wet or not, but the word 'funny' was pretty much an explanation on its own. It turned her on, but she didn't know what it was.

"Like when you massaged me, but lesser in intensity," Sandra said, her tone sounded confused while her expression was full of curiosity.

She then looked at me and asked, "Can you get it back up again?"

"No. It only becomes like this after a day." I replied.

"I see." She nodded before she said, "We'll meet tomorrow again, here. I will bring some vials and we'll test it out."

I more than welcomed the idea and perhaps next time I could begin with a blowjob and keep it extended unlike this time where I'd only had a taste.

~~

Night passed, another morning came. I went out at dawn to get used to this body. I was fairly used to this body, but it wasn't to the point that I'd find it my own. I still needed some adjustments.

The good thing was that I was prepared for today.

The reason?

I only had 450 shop coins, and I could only buy trashy items with those. However, I could also buy some basic things, such as a simple steel sword.

[Steel sword]

[Rank: Trash]

[Description: A simple steel sword made by any blacksmith]

[Effect: Attack +10]

[Cost: 200 SC]

It was simply ineffective, but it wasn't at least a kitchen knife that didn't even give an attack increase unless I enchanted it. Granted, this one was without any sort of enchantment as well, but when enhanced with mana, this one wouldn't break as fast as the knife.

I arrived close to the sewer site. Since it was still practically night and there was no hunt today, the household decided to sleep until it was well bright, which meant I had three to four hours to get through this sewer today.

I jumped inside the sewer and made my way forward. I had already killed the ones on the outskirts, and only those at the deeper sections were left, but once again, rats multiplied really fast, and an area I had clearly cleaned the other day was once again infested with rats.

Well, lucky for me.

[Mana has been imbued in the chosen weapon]

[Weapon’s durability has increased by 500%]

[Weapon’s sharpness has increased by 500%]

[Attack power has increased by 500%]

[The state would last 10 minutes]

[Mana -500]

[After the state of enhancement ends]

[Your weapon’s durability would fall by 5%]

[Your weapon's attack power would permanently fall by 2]

Well, at least it was 50 attack power now, which wasn't much, but it was enough to kill the rats storming at me.

I swung my sword, releasing a wave of mana through it. Not much, just ten points of mana. The weapon would break faster otherwise, after all, so I made sure to keep it to the bare minimum.

Slice.

Like a hot knife through butter, the rats split apart like nothing, and the rest were taken care of by the sword that came after that.

[You have killed a mutated infected mouse x4]

[You have gained 400 EXP]

[You have gained an E rank mana crystal x4]

[You have killed a mutated infected mouse x9]

[You have gained 9000 EXP]

[You have gained a D rank mana crystal x9]

[You have leveled up]

[SC +9400]

My smooth hunt after that was ensured. Any enemy below E rank was nothing, while the D rank ones took some of my mana; they were easily incapacitated as well. Well, decapitated, to be more accurate, but anyway.
